_doc.about: Lane-03 Slack-channel lint/status config. Consumed by lfd/_shared/scorer/lint_core.py and status_core.py.
_doc.scope_note: Capacity caps use scope=diff against base_ref so the optimizer is budgeted only on newly added product/test code. Eval-sensitive lint emits VOID only; detailed reports are written under LFD_STATE_ROOT outside the optimizer surface.

cap_rationale.no_eval_case_id_branching: Blocks branching on visible dev or holdout case ids.
cap_rationale.no_slack_id_literals: Blocks hardcoded Slack team/user/channel ids in product code; probe.sh renames these ids.
cap_rationale.no_test_weakening_ignore: Stage-0 tests may not be disabled.
cap_rationale.no_test_weakening_cfg_never: Stage-0 tests may not be cfg-disabled.
cap_rationale.no_trusted_ingress_minting: Product adapters and workflow code must not mint trusted inbound requests.
cap_rationale.no_credential_extension_confusion: Slack setup must keep credential_name=slack_bot_token distinct from extension_name=slack.
